name: /measure-rubric --interactive appends a triage entry to rubric/fp-log/<rule-id>.jsonl per the F-2 FP triage clause
command: git init -q repo && cd repo && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit --allow-empty -q -m c1 && echo y | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/measure-rubric.sh" --n 1 --interactive 2>err.txt && [ -s rubric/fp-log/g-x-001.jsonl ] && grep -q '"verdict":"y"' rubric/fp-log/g-x-001.jsonl && echo logged 1>&2
